name: PlacingAttributes
summary: The PlacingAttributes class contains the basic attributes for determining an object's placing.

constructors.name: PlacingAttributes
constructors.summary: Creates a new placing attributes instance. The default parameters are: IsFixed = true, default PlacingDistanceAttributes, default PlacingQuarterAttributes.

constructors.name: PlacingAttributes
constructors.summary: Creates a new placing quarter attributes instance with the given parameters.

methods.name: Clone
methods.summary: Creates a new object that is a copy of the current instance.

methods.name: IsEqual
methods.summary: Compares the current object with an object of the same type.

properties.name: IsFixed
properties.summary: Defines whether the object is using fixed or free placing. If set to true, it means that fixed placing is enabled, and the object will not be rearranged in the drawing automatically. If set to false, then free placing is enabled, and the object will be placed in the most appropriate location near the original location.

properties.name: PlacingDistance
properties.summary: Gets or sets the placing distance attributes.

properties.name: PlacingQuarter
properties.summary: Gets or sets the placing quarter attributes.
